content:
Google engineer Addy Osmani has unveiled Agent Skills, a new toolkit to elevate AI coding agents with 19 engineering best practices.  
Inspired by Google’s internal workflows, it enforces quality, rigor, and safety throughout the development lifecycle.

• Integrates 19 engineering skills and 7 slash commands into AI agents, promoting spec-first, test-driven, and secure development  
• Covers the full development lifecycle: Define, Plan, Build, Verify, Review, and Ship, with structured, verifiable steps  
• Embeds Google-grade practices like Shift Left, Chesterton's Fence, and Hyrum's Law directly into agent workflows  
• Compatible with Claude Code, Cursor, Antigravity, and any Markdown-based agent; free, open-source, and easy to install via `npx skills add addyosmani/agent-skills`
